feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to trigger the i9 reverification for the employees who are hired directly in Employee Central
entry.content: We have certain employees whose profiles were migrated from another system to SuccessFactors. For these employees, the I-9 tasks (Section 1 and Section 2) were completed offline outside SuccessFactors through email. Now we need to complete the I-9 reverification for these employees. Please advise on how this can be handled.

entry.title: SmartRecruiters + EC Position Management best practices?
entry.content:
Hello to the community

I’m currently working on a project where we’re looking at SmartRecruiters in combination with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (with Position Management enabled), and I’d be really interested in hearing how others have approached a few topics.

We’re facing some questions on process alignment, especially coming from a fairly structured SAP mindset.

First topic is around job creation vs positions. In standard SR it is possible to create jobs independently from EC positions, which is quite different from how some organizations want to operate . Have some of you implemented governance or configurations to enforce (or at least strongly encourage) job creation based on EC positions?

Also, have you seen any implementations where a position could be created in EC when a job is created in SmartRecruiters, or is this always handled outside of standard integrations?

About the hiring team setup, formore dynamic scenarios (e.g. assigning recruiters based on BU / location / job attributes), how far can we realistically go ? as far as I know, access groups is a way to give access to jobs meeting specific conditions but it is same level of access for everyone in the access group, no differentiation between recruiter and manager...Is there another way to do that? Through custom integration of some sort?

Also one challenge we face is that SmartRecruiters manages both the recruitment request and the job posting as a single object/workflow, whereas some organizations are used to a stricter separation (manager creates request → HR reviews → then job is published). Have you found good ways to structure this in SmartRecruiters (e.g. using approvals, draft stages, restricted publication), or is it more about adapting the process?

Any feedback, lessons learned, or design patterns would be super helpful.

Thanks so much

entry.title: Workflow not triggering
entry.content: i created this rule, when selecting the event and event reason as promotion.... and when saving the record in employee profile, its not triggering the workflow WF_EC_PROMOTION.

entry.title: How to make Matrix manager not Mandadory on the position
entry.content: Matrix manager field on position is mandadory and not all our positions should be mandadory, how do we remove that

entry.title: Workflow approval history no longer visible
entry.content:
Hi,
After moving to the latest people profile and updating permission as needed, our compensation team no longer can view workflow approval history. Legacy people profile they were able to see it with no issue. 

Is anyone else encountering this issue as well? We've given all the permissions that is required and it's not working. 

Any advice or guidance is much appreciated! 

Thanks in advance!
Annie

entry.title: How to calculate Annualized Salary Pay Component from Biweekly and other Pay Component Round it up?
entry.content:
The standard pay component group calculation is not rounding values accurately. Therefore, we intend to request the client to consolidate biweekly and other relevant pay components into a separate pay component (e.g., Annual Salary), apply the required rounding, and then include the result in a pay component group.

We would like to confirm whether this approach is feasible and if any reference materials can be provided to support it.

For context, the client is currently operating on S/4 and is transitioning to SuccessFactors, where two different calculation methods are used based on 26 and 26.1 payroll periods.

Note: Creating Custom Annualization Factors of 26.1 is also leading to Rounding issues/

entry.title: Configure a "Display Note" to approvers (Leaders) on the workflow in Employee central
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are creating a Workflow for termination and we would want the the leaders to be able to see a display note that asks them to review a few items/checklist before approving the workflow . Could anyone please let me know if there is such a functionality in our current workflow set up in Employee central?

entry.title: Trigger Notification / Alert based on workflow approval / rejection
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible, using business rules, to trigger notifications/alerts based on the status (approved/rejected) of a workflow?

The workflow goes to the line manager two months before the contract end date. If the manager approves the workflow, a notification should be sent to extend the contract. If the manager approves the workflow, a notification should be sent that the contract will not be extended.

entry.title: Story Reports - Creating a change audit report as a story report - Compare effective-dated records
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created a report to show changes in compensation data for a single employee at a time. I am trying to "filter out" records that don't show changes in the specific pay components I'm looking at.

Current configuration:

The bar charts successfully shows the data, but since my data model comes from Compensation Information, it creates a new data point for every record in the portlet, even if the specific pay components I'm using have not changed.


So the bars are for records in Dec 2023, Jan 2024, Dec 2024,  Jan 2025 and Dec 2025. You can see that the second and third values are the same, as well as the fourth and fifth. That's because something was changed in the compensation portlet (= new record), only not the pay components I'm using. 

For clarification: Every copy of the compensation item is filtered to a specific pay component. Some columns in my table in the report are calculations using these components.

So again: I don't want to show a bar if the record does not present changes in the specific pay components I'm looking at. 

Is there a way to compare each record to its previous record?

I have found this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-members/successfactors-people-analytics-stories-how-to-create-change-report-current/ba-p/13955924 

However, using this method one can only compare the latest record to its previous, not iteratively each record to their respective previous one.

Thanks in advance!
Ana

entry.title: Successfactors emplo
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently troubleshooting a new hire import issue in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central.

I imported new employees using the New Employee Import template and completed only the initial/basic employee import successfully. At this stage, I intentionally stopped before proceeding with additional imports such as:

  • Job Information
  • Employment Information
  • Compensation Information
  • Email Information
    etc.

I wanted to first troubleshoot and validate the initial employee creation before moving further.

Current issue:
After the basic import, I can see related records such as job codes, but when searching employees in SuccessFactors, the employee names themselves are not appearing correctly in search results.

In some cases:

  • the employee ID exists,
  • the job code appears,
  • but the employee profile/name is not searchable as expected.

I am trying to understand:

  1. Is this expected behavior if only the basic import is completed?
  2. Are there specific entities/imports required before the employee becomes fully searchable in EC?
  3. Could this be related to missing User ID / Person ID External / Employment linkage?
  4. Is there a recommended sequence for completing new hire imports in EC to avoid partial employee creation issues?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Create a Welcome email when a new employee is hired with time schedule to send after 24h after hired
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is it possible to create a Welcome email when a new employee is hired format the message text and set a time parameter so that it is sent 24 hours after the employee is added to the system?


Employee Central - SuccessFactors doubts

Kind regards,
Miss Jo

entry.title: SF_COM_Compa_Ratio_and_Range_Penetration_v2.0 merges compa ratio from multiple employee assignments
entry.content:
Hello,

The named SAP template provides a merged result of compa ratio from multiple assignments (both active & inactive) employee has.
Employment Status filter in Query or in report page does not allow to filter out inactive employees (that would include inactive assignments as well). Using that filter results in timing out the session in browser or making an error and not allowing to save the filter setting.
If anyone has experienced similar situation, how did you resolve it?

Tadas

entry.title: SAP Success Factors: where to find Master Picklists in SAP Software Download Center?
entry.content:
Can anybody guide me through this? I can land into a page from that link, but there are no picklists to browse. Am I searching it wrong?  Thank you in advance! 

/Browse/Courses/SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy/Importing a Picklist in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: nationalId from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to Microsoft Entra ID
entry.content:
Hi experts

We try to get nationalId synced to Microsoft Entra ID through the SuccessFactors, but are having a hard time getting the JSON path API Expression correct. 
We have extracted the value through Postman, using this query:
api55.sapsf.eu/odata/v2/EmpEmployment?$format=JSON&$expand=personNav,personNav/nationalIdNav&$filter=personIdExternal eq 'XXXXXXXX'

$.personNav.nationalIdNav.results[?(@.cardType == nationalId)].nationalId
$.personNav.nationalIdNav..results[?(@.emplStatusNav.externalCode == 'A' || @.emplStatusNav.externalCode == 'U' || @.emplStatusNav.externalCode == 'P')])].nationalId
$.personNav.nationalIdNav.results[0].nationalId
$.nationalIdNav.results[?(@.cardType == 'BN')].nationalId

none of the return any value. I reckon permissions should be okay as we are able to retrieve in OData API with Postman. 

Have anybody been able to retrieve this value?

entry.title: Integration approach for existing (“green”) SmartRecruiters customers
entry.content:
Hello community,
 
We are currently supporting several clients who are existing SmartRecruiters customers (“green” clients), and who are now planning to implement SAP SuccessFactors (Employee Central and potentially Onboarding).
 
At this stage, we understand that these customers are not eligible for the new productized integrations / standard connectors being released in 2026 as part of the SAP–SmartRecruiters partnership. We therefore need to define an alternative integration approach based on custom integrations. Our objective is to replicate the main integration flows typically covered by the productized integration, including:
- User Sync (creation, update, deactivation)
- Foundation / Organizational Data Sync (e.g., Departments, Locations, Legal Entities, etc.)
- Job Sync / Job Creation (from SAP SuccessFactors or external initiation)
- Hire Sync (from SmartRecruiters to Employee Central and potentially SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding)
 
In this context, we would like to understand:
 
1. What is the recommended integration approach for such “green” customers today?
2. Are there supported API-based patterns or reference architectures that we should follow?
3. Are there any known limitations or constraints compared to the productized integration? 4. Are there preferred tools or approaches (e.g., middleware, specific APIs, SCIM for users, etc.)?
5. Are there any existing implementation examples or best practices that can be shared? We are currently responding to active RFPs and need to propose a reliable and supported architecture to our clients. Any guidance or documentation would be highly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Reporting: Creating a User Report with Assigned job Attributes
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to create a user report with assigned job attributes in Manage Job Profile -> Job Classifications and in Job Profile Content? For example, I would like to create a report with these fields:

User ID, Name, Hire Date, Status, Cost Center, Job Code, Title, Grade, FLSA (Job Classification),  grade range (Job Classification), Job Family (Job Profile Content).

Help with building a Story Report would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: BIB Replicating departments from EC to HCM, changing the OBJID
entry.content:
So i need to replicate both Employees and Organizational Objets from SAP SF EC to SAP HCM, but i need the Ids to come from a specific field and not the IDs in SuccessFactors , for the Employee and it's PERNR i used IF_ECPAO_IN_EXT_PERNR_MAP, but now i'm trying to find a similar solution for Org Objs is there a BADi that allows that ? or any other way ?
I would really appreciate the help.

entry.title: Check Tool (COC) - DuplicateCompetencyNameCheck
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While we are in the process of migrating to Talent Intelligence Hub, and working on with the check tool, an error for center of capabilities section appears particularly DuplicateCompetencyNameCheck.

There are duplicates on the competency that we need to resolve.

For this, if there are many duplicate items, may I know how the process is done now via imports? I am not sure if there are changes but I am getting error with the correction via import.

Since there are several items, manually editing not applicable.

Thank you very much!

 

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Unable to Enroll in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Practice System (HR811)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Learning Support Team,

I am trying to enroll in the Hands-on Practice for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Administration (HR811) practice system through SAP Learning. However, I am unable to access or enroll in the practice system.

While attempting to enroll, I receive the following error message:

"Temporarily restricted – Access temporarily restricted due to maintenance. If the problem continues, Contact Support."

I have been facing this issue for some time and am unable to proceed with my practice sessions. I have already verified my subscription and tried accessing the system multiple times, but the issue still persists.

Could you please check the status of the practice system and help me gain access or provide an estimated timeline for when the system will be available again?

Details:

  • Course/Practice System: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Administration
  • Practice System ID: HR811
  • SAP Learning Account Email: santhoshsapsf15@gmail.com

I have attached a screenshot of the error message for your reference.

Your assistance in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

Best Regards,
SanthoshKrishnan T
Email: santhoshsapsf15@gmail.com

entry.title: CWK Paused
entry.content:
Good Morning

We are looking into possibilities of pausing CWK contracts in the middle, more like breaking the employment during contractual period, an example lets say an employee signed a 12 months contract but we dont expect them to work on the 6th month, they should resume work on the 7th month, is there a way of achieving, not through a work order but event reasons?

Your help will be appriciated

Regards

Thabo
